imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Warm, family-oriented header banner with abstract shapes and earth tones (header-banner.dim_1200x300.png)
- Placeholder illustration representing a family gathering or photo album in warm colors (family-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)

existing_features.title: Build a homepage that displays all blog posts in reverse chronological order with title, author, excerpt, and timestamp
Create a blog post detail page that displays the full post content, author information, and all associated comments
Implement a comment form on the post detail page allowing users to add new comments with their name and comment text
Create a blog post creation form with fields for title, author name, content, and optional featured image URL
Implement post editing functionality allowing users to update existing blog posts
Add a delete button to posts that allows removal with confirmation

Design and implement a cohesive visual theme inspired by warm, family-oriented aesthetics with earth tones, comfortable typography, and inviting layouts that create a welcoming atmosphere for sharing family stories and memories
Render generated header banner and family photo placeholder images as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a backend data model for blog posts with fields: id, title, content, author name, creation timestamp, and optional featured image URL
Implement backend methods to create, read, update, and delete blog posts
Create a backend data model for comments with fields: id, post id reference, author name, comment text, and timestamp
Implement backend methods to add comments to posts and retrieve all comments for a specific post
